SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.awt

Class AwtImageUtil

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.awt.AwtImageUtil
All Implemented Interfaces:
ImageUtil<AwtImage,AwtMutableImage>
public final class AwtImageUtil extends Object implements ImageUtil<AwtImage,AwtMutableImage>
An implementation of the ImageUtil interface for working with awt images.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.dua3.utility.data.ImageUtil

    ImageUtil.LoadOption

      public AwtImage load(Payload payload, ImageUtil.LoadOption loadOption) throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: ImageUtil
      Load image.
      Specified by:
      load in interface ImageUtil<AwtImage,AwtMutableImage>
      Parameters:
      payload - the Payload to load the image from
      loadOption - the load option to apply
      Returns:
      the image
      Throws:
      IOException - if loading fails

    • createImage

      public AwtMutableImage createImage(int w, int h, int[] data)
      Description copied from interface: ImageUtil
      Creates an image from premultiplied ARGB pixel data.
      Specified by:
      createImage in interface ImageUtil<AwtImage,AwtMutableImage>
      Parameters:
      w - image width in pixels
      h - image height in pixels
      data - pixel data as premultiplied ARGB values
      Returns:
      a new mutable AWT image backed by the provided pixel data

    • createImage

      public AwtMutableImage createImage(int w, int h)
      Description copied from interface: ImageUtil
      Create an empty MutableImage.
      Specified by:
      createImage in interface ImageUtil<AwtImage,AwtMutableImage>
      Parameters:
      w - the image width
      h - the image height
      Returns:
      new MutableImage

    • toImage

      public AwtMutableImage toImage(Image img)
      Converts an instance of com.dua3.utility.data.Image into an AwtImage. If the provided image is already an instance of AwtImage, it is returned directly. Otherwise, a new AwtImage is created based on the dimensions and pixel data of the input image.
      Specified by:
      toImage in interface ImageUtil<AwtImage,AwtMutableImage>
      Parameters:
      img - the Image to be converted
      Returns:
      the converted AwtImage instance

    • toMutableImage

      public AwtMutableImage toMutableImage(BufferedImage img)
      Converts a BufferedImage to an AwtMutableImage.
      Parameters:
      img - the BufferedImage to be converted
      Returns:
      the converted AwtImage
